role: Secretary-general of Freedom Movement of Iran (1995–2017); former Foreign Minister
bio: Pharmacologist and political activist. Organized [Freedom Movement of Iran](/orgs/freedom-movement-of-iran) activities in the United States during exile. Served as foreign minister in [Bazargan](/people/mehdi-bazargan)'s provisional government (1979). Second secretary-general of the Freedom Movement (1995–2017). Repeatedly arrested and imprisoned by the Islamic Republic. Participated in the [1979 revolution](/events/iranian-revolution-1979). Died 27 August 2017.
